author: laura
body: Added the clear-space diagram and the ampersand mark variants under logo usage. Let me know if the minimum sizes feel right for in-store signage.

author: dwhitcomb
body: Wordmark looks great. One ask: can we get a reversed version for the dark slate backgrounds before sign-off?

author: mwebb
body: Quick question on the type scale - are the headline sizes locked, or is there room to nudge the 28 down a step for the email templates?
